title: Provider HTTP timeouts — hung call blocks consumer thread indefinitely
current_state: Provider clients have no HTTP timeouts; a hung Cerebras/Groq/Gemini/OpenRouter/Anthropic call can block the LLM router forever.
target_state: All 5 providers have a hard HTTP timeout in their constructor: cerebras 25s, groq 25s, openrouter 30s, anthropic 120s, gemini 30s.
solution: Added timeout= to constructor of all 5 provider clients. Gemini uses http_options={"timeout":30} with try/except fallback.
